framework: WordPress block theme — child of Twenty Twenty-Five (wp-content/themes/lapin-negotiation-services)
font_stack: none in child theme; parent Twenty Twenty-Five supplies Manrope + Fira Code via its theme.json (child theme.json is empty, parent shows through)
palette: none in child theme; child theme.json has empty settings/styles, parent palette active
motion: none — no motion library, no JS in child theme or lapin-core plugin
spacing: none in child theme; parent preset spacing scale active
tokens: none — no tokens.css, no design.md, no Tailwind
notes: style.css is a bare child-theme header enqueued via functions.php. lapin-core plugin is an empty module-loader scaffold (includes/ has only .gitkeep). Effectively a blank canvas on top of Twenty Twenty-Five.
